name: sdlc
description: Streamlines the SDLC lifecycle: ticket authoring (spec-to-backlog, triage-issue, create-ticket), starting work (fetch ticket, branch, status transition, route to the right superpowers skill), and finishing work (PR + cross-link + Jira status updates). Delegates to the atlassian plugin for Jira/Confluence writes when installed; falls back to markdown output when not. Enforces the Agile standards in references/standards.md (story-point table, Definition of Ready, required tags).
